ayahs.translation: Read! In the Name of your Lord, Who has created (all that exists).
And He taught Adam the names of all things.
He has taught man that which he knew not.
And say: My Lord! Increase me in knowledge.

ayahs.arabic: هَلْ يَسْتَوِي الَّذِينَ يَعْلَمُونَ وَالَّذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Hal yastawee alladhina ya'lamuna walladhina la ya'lamun
ayahs.translation: Are those who know equal to those who know not?

ayahs.arabic: يَرْفَعِ اللَّهُ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا مِنكُمْ وَالَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْعِلْمَ دَرَجَاتٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Yarfa'i Allahu alladhina amanu minkum walladhina utu al-'ilma darajat
ayahs.translation: Allah will exalt in degree those of you who believe and those who have been granted knowledge.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا أُوتِيتُم مِّنَ الْعِلْمِ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wa ma utitum mina al-'ilmi illa qalila
ayahs.translation: And of knowledge, you (mankind) have been given only a little.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّمَا يَخْشَى اللَّهَ مِنْ عِبَادِهِ الْعُلَمَاءُ
ayahs.translation: It is only those who have knowledge among His slaves that fear Allah.
Will they not then ponder over the Quran?

ayahs.arabic: سَنُرِيهِمْ آيَاتِنَا فِي الْآفَاقِ وَفِي أَنفُسِهِمْ
ayahs.transliteration: Sanureehim ayatina fee al-afaqi wa fee anfusihim
ayahs.translation: We will show them Our signs in the horizons and within themselves until it becomes clear to them that it is the truth.

ayahs.arabic: وَعَلَى اللَّهِ فَتَوَكَّلُوا إِن كُنتُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa 'ala Allahi fatawakkalu in kuntum mu'minin
ayahs.translation: And put your trust in Allah if you are believers indeed.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa man yatawakkal 'ala Allahi fahuwa hasbuh
ayahs.translation: And whosoever puts his trust in Allah, then He will suffice him.
Then when you have taken a decision, put your trust in Allah.
Truly, Allah is with the patient ones (As-Sabirun).
Allah is Sufficient for us, and He is the Best Disposer of affairs.
And my success cannot come from anywhere except from Allah.

ayahs.arabic: قُل لَّن يُصِيبَنَا إِلَّا مَا كَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَنَا
ayahs.transliteration: Qul lan yusibana illa ma kataba Allahu lana
ayahs.translation: Say: Nothing shall ever happen to us except what Allah has ordained for us.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِن تَعُدُّوا نِعْمَتَ اللَّهِ لَا تُحْصُوهَا
ayahs.transliteration: Wa in ta'uddu ni'mata Allahi la tuhsuha
ayahs.translation: And if you count the blessings of Allah, never will you be able to count them.
Is not Allah Sufficient for His slave?
And seek help in patience and As-Salat (the prayer).
Truly, Allah loves the Muhsinun (good-doers).
Who made everything He has created good.

ayahs.transliteration: Wa ahsinu inna Allaha yuhibbu al-muhsineen
ayahs.translation: And do good. Truly, Allah loves the good-doers.
Is there any reward for good other than good?

ayahs.arabic: وَمَنْ أَحْسَنُ دِينًا مِّمَّنْ أَسْلَمَ وَجْهَهُ لِلَّهِ وَهُوَ مُحْسِنٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa man ahsanu deenan mimman aslama wajhahu lillahi wa huwa muhsin
ayahs.translation: And who is better in religion than one who submits himself to Allah while being a doer of good.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ اللَّهَ لَا يُضِيعُ أَجْرَ الْمُحْسِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna Allaha la yudi'u ajra al-muhsineen
ayahs.translation: Surely, Allah does not waste the reward of the doers of good.
And speak good to people.
Repel (evil) with that which is better.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا أَنفَقْتُم مِّن شَيْءٍ فَهُوَ يُخْلِفُهُ وَهُوَ خَيْرُ الرَّازِقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa ma anfaqtum min shay'in fahuwa yukhlifuhu wa huwa khayru ar-raziqeen
ayahs.translation: And whatsoever you spend of anything (in Allah's cause), He will replace it. And He is the Best of providers.
And Allah loves those who make themselves clean and pure.

ayahs.transliteration: Wasbir wa ma sabruka illa billah
ayahs.translation: And be patient — your patience is not but through Allah.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّمَا يُوَفَّى الصَّابِرُونَ أَجْرَهُم بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Innama yuwaffa as-sabiruna ajrahum bighayri hisab
ayahs.translation: Only those who are patient shall receive their reward in full, without reckoning.

ayahs.transliteration: Wa lanabluwan nakum bishay'in mina al-khawfi wal-ju'
ayahs.translation: And certainly, We shall test you with something of fear, hunger, loss of wealth, lives and fruits.
Verily, with the hardship, there is relief.

ayahs.arabic: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اسْتَعِينُوا بِالصَّبْرِ وَالصَّلَاةِ
ayahs.transliteration: Ya ayyuha alladhina amanu ista'inu bis-sabri was-salah
ayahs.translation: O you who believe! Seek help in patience and As-Salat (the prayer).
And be patient. Surely, Allah is with those who are patient.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَمَن صَبَرَ وَغَفَرَ إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمِنْ عَزْمِ الْأُمُورِ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa laman sabara wa ghafara inna dhalika lamin 'azmi al-umur
ayahs.translation: And verily, whosoever shows patience and forgives — that would truly be from the things recommended by Allah.
And give glad tidings to the patient ones (As-Sabirun).
So be patient, with a good patience.
And Allah is the Patient.

ayahs.arabic: فَاذْكُرُونِي أَذْكُرْكُمْ وَاشْكُرُوا لِي وَلَا تَكْفُرُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Fadhkuruni adhkurkum washkuru lee wa la takfurun
ayahs.translation: Therefore remember Me. I will remember you, and be grateful to Me and never be ungrateful to Me.
If you are grateful, I will surely increase you (in favor).

ayahs.arabic: وَإِن تَعُدُّوا نِعْمَةَ اللَّهِ لَا تُحْصُوهَا
ayahs.transliteration: Wa in ta'uddu ni'mata Allahi la tuhsuha
ayahs.translation: And if you should count the favors of Allah, you could not enumerate them.
And few of My slaves are grateful.

ayahs.arabic: وَاشْكُرُوا لِلَّهِ إِن كُنتُمْ إِيَّاهُ تَعْبُدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Washkuru lillahi in kuntum iyyahu ta'budun
ayahs.translation: And be grateful to Allah, if it is (indeed) He Whom you worship.
All the praises and thanks be to Allah, the Lord of the 'Alamin (mankind, jinns and all that exists).

ayahs.arabic: رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِي أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ الَّتِي أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيَّ
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbi awzi'ni an ashkura ni'mataka allati an'amta 'alayya
ayahs.translation: My Lord! Inspire and bestow upon me the power and ability that I may be grateful for Your Favours which You have bestowed on me.

ayahs.arabic: مَا يَفْعَلُ اللَّهُ بِعَذَابِكُمْ إِن شَكَرْتُمْ وَآمَنتُمْ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma yaf'alu Allahu bi'adhabikum in shakartum wa amantum
ayahs.translation: Why should Allah punish you if you have thanked (Him) and have believed in Him.
Give thanks to Me and to your parents.
Glory be to Him Who has created all the pairs.
